claim_supported: Analysis pipeline recovers known synthetic worlds sufficiently for downstream pilots.
key_caveat: Synthetic validation only; not a neural result.

claim_supported: Quanta-style baseline: frequency effect is strong when learnable (e.g. threshold .85 rho≈-0.71).
key_caveat: Acquisition coverage remains modest (≈0.242); final use should improve coverage.

claim_supported: Reference learnability robustly predicts later acquisition across configs (mean rho≈0.537); atomic frequency is expected-direction but weaker (rho≈-0.318).
key_caveat: Pilot grid only; frequency is weak/reversed inside composites.

claim_supported: Atomic acquisition is explained by simple one-factor predictors with config drift; composite residuals select intervention candidates.
key_caveat: Residuals are observational and do not prove dependency.

claim_supported: A02_substitute → C06 shows pair-specific causal evidence under exact pretraining and strong corruption beyond same/different-operation controls.
key_caveat: A00_copy → C06 is weak/mixed; result is not a universal component-dependency claim.
